core_permissions.name: Quyen sao chep
core_permissions.description: Cho phep sao chep ban ghi va tac pham phuc vu khai thac thuong mai.

core_permissions.name: Quyen phan phoi
core_permissions.description: Cho phep phan phoi ban sao, ban ghi va cac hinh thuc luu hanh hop phap.

core_permissions.name: Quyen truyen dat den cong chung
core_permissions.description: Cho phep dua tac pham den cong chung thong qua nen tang so va kenh phat hanh.

core_permissions.name: Quyen bieu dien truoc cong chung
core_permissions.description: Cho phep bieu dien, phat nhac va khai thac trong cac khong gian cong cong.

core_permissions.name: Quyen lam tac pham phai sinh
core_permissions.description: Cho phep cai bien, phoi khi va tao san pham phai sinh tu tac pham goc.
